example: The soup is boiling on the stove.
The garbage truck is coming to collect the trash.
No time, must rush to finish the work.
I am freezing because it is very cold outside.
I am locked out because I forgot my keys.
If the soup burns, it could cause an emergency.
They are distracted by their headphones and cannot hear me.
zh: 分心的，注意力不集中的

example: I will aim the snowballs at Jack's window.
I use a ladder to climb up to the window.
The snow is slippery, so be careful not to fall.
This cake should bring some cheer to the neighbors.
I rang the doorbell but nobody responds.
The cable box outside provides internet to the house.
If I disconnect the cable box, the internet will stop.
Check the router if the Wi-Fi is down.
He was in his man cave watching Netflix.
zh: 男人的私人空間或房間

example: He was watching Netflix in his room.
I surrender, I was wrong.
We will play board games without screens.
The cable is not unplugged but broken.
ja: プラグが抜けていない

example: I am desperate to fix the internet problem.
